{{Quote|Do you think you can hide? By Andeddu's flames, I'll hunt you down.|Vaneé, to Thom Hudd|<ref name="RVC 2">[[Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle 2|''Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle'' 2]]</ref>}}
'''Andeddu''' was an ancient [[Sith Lord]]<ref name="TROS VD" /> who was the subject of the [[List of phrases and slang|phrase]] "Andeddu's [[Fire|flames]]." During the [[Imperial Era|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire]], the [[Dark Lord of the Sith|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader's]] [[Aide|servant]], [[Vaneé]], used the expression when he swore to capture the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] [[Lieutenant]] [[Thom Hudd]] after the latter escaped [[Prisoner|captivity]] in [[Fortress Vader|Vader's castle]] on the [[planet]] [[Mustafar]].<ref name="RVC 2" />

[[Standard year|Years]] later, the [[Sith Eternal]], a [[Sith cult|cult]] of [[Sith cultist|Sith loyalists]]<ref name="TROS VD" /> that was active in [[35 ABY]],<ref name="SWT">''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]''</ref> drew their [[Sith trooper]] unit names after ancient [[Sith]] [[Lord]]s. The [[Andeddu Legion]] was consequently named after them, whose name and history were hidden from the rest of [[the galaxy]].<ref name="TROS VD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Andeddu was first mentioned in the current ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle 2|''Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle'' 2]], which was written by [[Cavan Scott]] and released by [[IDW Publishing]]<ref name="RVC 2" /> on [[October 9]], [[2019]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SW|url=news/return-to-vaders-castle-2-exclusive-preview|text=Inside the Cold Heart of Governor Tarkin in ''Return to Vader's Castle'' #2 - Exclusive|date=2019-10-02|quote=In ''Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle'' issue #2, due out on October 9, […]}}</ref> The character of [[Darth Andeddu]] was originally introduced in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity via [[Republic 63|''Republic'' 63]], a comic book that was written by [[John Ostrander]], penciled by [[Jan Duursema]], and released by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="R 63">[[Republic 63|''Republic'' 63]]</ref> on [[April 7]], [[2004]].<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/13-077/Star-Wars-Republic-63|text=Star Wars: Republic #63}}</ref>
